caption: The plotted PCI/DGI curves retain the existing two-panel comparison. The accompanying CSV data and canonical ledger extend the identical evolving matched-ROI pipeline to dark-field and dual-port Faraday. Faraday values use kappa_F=1.0 and are Version 1 uncalibrated structural comparisons, not absolute predictions.
figure_type: clean-loss matched-ROI reference versus evolving heating-aware multishot accumulated SNR

observable_design.faraday_dark_field_observable: crossed-analyser electron counts relative to zero background
observable_design.reference_image_noise: not included, matching the notebook convention of a known reference background
observable_design.single_port_read_variance: 3 e- rms squared per binned camera pixel
observable_design.single_port_shot_variance: total expected photons in each ROI pixel

parameter_provenance.quantum_efficiency_status: experimentally plausible dissertation screening value; not measured
parameter_provenance.read_noise_status: experimentally plausible dissertation screening value; not measured

physics_model.faraday_fields: opposite circular phases propagated and recombined into Ex/Ey, dark field, and U/V ports
physics_model.image_update: full complex phase field propagated through the configured Fourier pupil
physics_model.reabsorption: initial-density angle-averaged notebook fraction, held fixed within each sequence
physics_model.recoil_energy_convention: complete absorption-spontaneous-emission cycle deposits 2 E_rec per primary or reabsorbed scattering event
physics_model.state_update: Thomas-Fermi state regenerated from evolving N0

stopping_semantics.acceptance_rule: include a frame only when the post-pulse state remains within the threshold
stopping_semantics.accepted_frame_state: pre-pulse state after frame_index prior pulses
